title: Animated Buttons
code: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background:#0f0f1a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;min-height:100vh;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}.animated-btn{padding:15px 30px;border:none;border-radius:50px;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:0.3s}.btn1{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff6b6b,#ee5a24);color:#fff}.btn1:hover{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 5px 20px rgba(255,107,107,0.4)}.btn2{background:transparent;border:2px solid #00d4ff;color:#00d4ff}.btn2:hover{background:#00d4ff;color:#000;box-shadow:0 0 20px #00d4ff}.btn3{background:#1e1e2f;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}.btn3:hover{transform:translateY(-3px)}.btn4{background:#2c3e50;color:#ecf0f1}.btn4::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#fff,transparent);transition:0.5s}.btn4:hover::before{left:100%}</style></head><body><button class="animated-btn btn1">Hover Me</button><button class="animated-btn btn2">Neon Effect</button><button class="animated-btn btn3">3D Lift</button><button class="animated-btn btn4">Shine</button></body></html>

title: Social Buttons
code: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background:#0f0f1a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;min-height:100vh;gap:15px;flex-wrap:wrap}.social-btn{padding:12px 25px;border:none;border-radius:50px;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;transition:0.3s;color:#fff}.github{background:#333}.twitter{background:#1DA1F2}.facebook{background:#1877F2}.instagram{background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 110%,#ffdb8f,#f9ce34,#ee2a7b,#6228d7)}.discord{background:#5865F2}.social-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}</style></head><body><button class="social-btn github">GitHub</button><button class="social-btn twitter">Twitter</button><button class="social-btn facebook">Facebook</button><button class="social-btn instagram">Instagram</button><button class="social-btn discord">Discord</button></body></html>
